highlights: OpenAI unveiled GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with enhanced capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, alongside new Daybreak security tools like Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber.

The AI ecosystem is seeing rapid advancements in agent capabilities, marked by new benchmarks like GeneBench-Pro for genomics AI and ScarfBench for enterprise Java migration agents, alongside foundational hardware innovation from OpenAI and Broadcom's LLM-optimized Jalapeño chip.

Key partnerships, such as HP Inc.'s expanded collaboration with OpenAI, and developer tooling improvements, like Hugging Face simplifying vLLM server deployment, are enabling greater enterprise AI adoption and operational efficiency for builders.

agents.title: How agents are transforming work
agents.summary: New OpenAI research highlights how AI agents are enabling longer, more complex tasks, significantly expanding productivity across various roles by transforming workflows.

agents.title: ScarfBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Enterprise Java Framework Migration
agents.summary: IBM Research introduces ScarfBench, a new benchmark designed to rigorously test and evaluate the performance of AI agents specifically tailored for complex enterprise Java framework migration tasks.

agents.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
agents.summary: This guide provides practical methods for developers to benchmark the 'agentic' capabilities of open models using their own tools, ensuring effective integration and performance validation for agent-driven applications.

models.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
models.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a powerful next-generation model engineered with significantly stronger capabilities in coding, scientific research, and cybersecurity, coupled with its most advanced safety protocols to date.

models.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
models.summary: OpenAI unveils GeneBench-Pro, a novel benchmark designed to evaluate AI model performance rigorously in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

models.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
models.summary: Hugging Face and Cerebras collaborate to optimize Gemma 4, enabling its application for real-time voice AI scenarios, delivering enhanced performance and efficiency for conversational applications.

tools.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
tools.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, empowering organizations to proactively find, validate, and patch software vulnerabilities at scale with advanced AI assistance.

tools.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
tools.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom have collaborated to introduce "Jalapeño," a custom AI chip specifically engineered for large language model (LLM) inference, promising significant improvements in performance, efficiency, and scalability for AI systems.

tools.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
tools.summary: Hugging Face simplifies LLM deployment by enabling users to run a vLLM server on Hugging Face Jobs with a single command, streamlining the process of serving large models for developers.

companies.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
companies.summary: HP Inc. has scaled its strategic Frontier partnership with OpenAI to deeply embed AI across its customer experiences, software development processes, and enterprise operations, accelerating its AI transformation.

companies.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
companies.summary: GPT-5 Pro proved instrumental in resolving a long-standing immunology mystery, providing critical insights into T cell behavior that could accelerate research in cancer and autoimmune diseases.

companies.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
companies.summary: New OpenAI Signals data demonstrates robust global expansion of ChatGPT adoption, with users increasingly leveraging its diverse capabilities, driving growth across various regions and languages.

learning.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
learning.summary: This guide details how developers can maximize Codex's capabilities to maintain context, manage complex projects efficiently, and sustain productive workflows beyond single prompts.

learning.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
learning.summary: A Google expert demystifies the "full-stack AI" approach, explaining its foundational importance in AI development and offering insights into building comprehensive AI solutions.

learning.title: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?
learning.summary: This article explores advanced fine-tuning techniques beyond LoRA, providing insights into methods that can potentially outperform the popular approach for optimizing large language models.
